creator: w.schwarzenfeld@aon.at
text:
I know there is a new maintainer, I make it cause of a request on pipermail.

ChangeLog:    
Added Extensions setting.
    Added support for X-Sendfile header.
    mbed TLS updated to 2.2.1.
    Improved SQL injection detection.
    Small bugfixes and improvements.

portlint:
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: no ftp/http mirror in MASTER_SITES for users behind a proxy.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.
